title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker23: coap_config.c
close_reason: Resolved merge conflict in coap_config.c by changing COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE service from lichen_coap_server to lichen_coap to match modular gateway pattern and prevent symbol collision with lichen_config. Updated in worker23 worktree and pushed. Consistent with previous resolutions in v99p and others.
